name: Lemon-Pecan Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and margarine until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg yolks to the mixture and mix well.
3. Combine 2 cups flour with baking powder in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add this dry mixture to the creamed mixture, mixing continuously.
5. Stir in the lemon extract.
6. Coat the pecans, pineapple, and cherries with the remaining 2 cups of flour.
7. Add these coated ingredients to the creamed mixture.
8. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites until just incorporated.
9. Cover the batter and let it stand overnight.
10. To bake, pour the batter into a greased (10") tube pan.
11. Bake at 325 degrees for 1-1/2 hours.
